sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114111" key="xlamudofore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χλᾰμῠδοφορέω</orth>, <sense id="n114111.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wear a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χλαμύς,</foreign> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Θετταλίζειν</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
